billing.title: Billing & Plan
billing.subtitle: Manage your {{brandName}} subscription, view usage, and upgrade your plan.
billing.cancelWarning: Your subscription will cancel at the end of the current billing period.
billing.stripeNotConfigured: Paid upgrades are not available yet
billing.stripeKeyHint: Add STRIPE_SECRET_KEY to the backend .env and restart the API.
billing.stripePriceHint: Set STRIPE_PRICE_* for Starter and Pro in .env, then restart the API.

pricing.title: Scale your document intelligence with
pricing.subtitle: From free exploration to enterprise-grade automation — choose the plan that fits your team.
pricing.upgradeSuccess: Your subscription has been upgraded! Welcome to your new plan.
pricing.upgradeCanceled: Upgrade canceled — you're still on your current plan.
pricing.notConfigured: Paid checkout is not configured on the server yet. Plans and limits below are live from your account API.
pricing.couldNotLoadPlans: Could not load plans. Please try again later.
pricing.trustBody1: SOC 2 aligned architecture. All data encrypted at rest and in transit.
pricing.trustBody2: Cancel anytime. Downgrade to Free whenever you want — no questions asked.
pricing.trustBody3: Upgrade and your limits increase immediately. No re-login required.
